overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction game showing an astronaut in an orange spacesuit exploring a dimly lit industrial space station interior with red emergency lighting. The character walks through metal corridors toward a green-lit bio-containment area and stops to observe the luminescent vegetation inside.

events.description: character approaches the green-lit containment chamber at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the industrial corridor toward the green-lit doorway, passing a yellow utility vehicle on the right

entered.detail: wall-mounted panel with two circular white lights and grid pattern
red warning light mounted on the ceiling casting crimson glow
dark metal wall panels with industrial rivets and piping
small circular yellow light embedded in the floor
small yellow cart or rover parked against the right wall
doorway emitting bright green light at the corridor end

segments.scene_description: The segment follows an astronaut walking through a narrow industrial corridor illuminated by red emergency lights. The character moves past a yellow utility vehicle parked on the right while approaching a distant green-lit doorway at the end of the hall.

events.description: character stops walking and stands still to observe the containment field

agents.ego_description: standing stationary and observing the bioluminescent vegetation glowing inside the green containment field

entered.detail: glowing green plants visible inside the containment chamber

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the entrance to a bio-containment area, where the lighting shifts to mix red emergency lights with the green glow of the chamber. The camera focuses on the luminescent vegetation inside the containment field while the corridor and utility vehicle recede into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a stark industrial corridor that transitions into a glowing bio-containment chamber. It begins by trailing an astronaut in an orange spacesuit as they navigate a narrow hallway bathed in red emergency lighting, passing a yellow utility vehicle parked along the wall. As the character approaches the end of the hall, the oppressive red hue begins to blend with a vibrant green glow emanating from a distant doorway. The scene then shifts focus as the astronaut stops at the threshold, allowing the industrial corridor to recede into the background. Finally, the camera settles on the luminescent vegetation thriving within the containment field, completing the transition from a mechanical environment to a biological one.
